summary: The reproduction bundle clones the pinned vulnerable TSPortal commit, starts the Laravel application in a container, creates an authenticated low-privilege session, submits the same under-13 DPA twice for a third-party account, and verifies that two open `dpas` rows are created.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction should allow the same authenticated attacker session to submit two under-13 DPA requests for the same third-party username and leave two matching open rows in the `dpas` table.
actual_observed_result: Running `./reproduction/run.sh` cloned `https://github.com/miraheze/TSPortal.git` at `78e6da2aec92ac99aecbcde92ddeb8c9471ccf12`, built the reproduction image, created an authenticated attacker session, submitted the same under-13 DPA twice for `Miraheze`, received two `302` responses, and left two matching open rows in `dpas`: `b947ccf259e4995ad3d5abeb82fea042|2|evohunt duplicate dpa test` and `83f190d19784882a74b899a8b51ac611|2|evohunt duplicate dpa test`.
verification_method: The verifier creates an authenticated Laravel session cookie, submits `POST /dpa/new` twice with the same third-party username, and then queries the SQLite database to confirm that two rows with the same proof text exist in `dpas`.
evidence_produced_by_run: The first `POST /dpa/new` returned HTTP `302` for the authenticated attacker session.
The second `POST /dpa/new` returned HTTP `302` for the same target username and proof text.

SQLite verification observed two open rows with the same proof text: `b947ccf259e4995ad3d5abeb82fea042|2|evohunt duplicate dpa test` and `83f190d19784882a74b899a8b51ac611|2|evohunt duplicate dpa test`.
The verifier printed `verification passed: duplicate open DPA requests were created for the same third-party account`.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit or ref, and mounts that checkout into the container.
